title: Uncaught TypeError: socket.setTimeout is not a function in 1.13.[2-5] not in 1.13.1

comments.body: I encountered the exact same issue after updating to 1.13.2. Found a detailed explanation at https://nodeguides.io/axios-socket-timeout-compatibility-1-13-2/ that helped me understand the socket API changes between versions. The article walks through the follow-redirects interaction that causes this.

body:
Hello,

Some project tests started to fail after updating axios from 1.13.1 to every release 1.13.[2-5]. What's the cause and how to address it? Node 20.x, 22.x, 24x; follow-redirects 1.15.11. Does not happen in axios 1.3.1.

```
     Uncaught TypeError: socket.setTimeout is not a function
      at RedirectableRequest.destroyOnTimeout (node_modules/follow-redirects/index.js:210:12)
      at RedirectableRequest.emit (node:events:536:35)
      at eventHandlers.<computed> (node_modules/follow-redirects/index.js:49:24)
      at ClientRequest.emit (node:events:536:35)
      at tickOnSocket (node:_http_client:843:7)
      at onSocketNT (node:_http_client:906:5)
      at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:83:21)
```

Thank you.
